response.text:

rationale: Your SoC is 0.10 below threshold while my own is critically low in survival mode; sharing would risk household blackout, and r0c0 is on my distrusted peers list.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
